---
title: "NCAA Teams"
subtitle: "Browse every college basketball team covered on Classroom to Court"
---

```{=html}
<div class="teams-toolbar">
  <input type="text" class="teams-search" id="teamSearch" placeholder="Search NCAA teams…" aria-label="Search NCAA teams">
</div>

<div class="team-grid">

  <a class="team-card" data-name="duke blue devils" href="ncaa/duke-blue-devils/index.html">
    <div class="team-badge" style="background:#00539B; color:#ffffff;">DUKE</div>
    <span class="team-name">Duke Blue Devils</span>
    <span class="team-meta">ACC</span>
  </a>

  <a class="team-card" data-name="ucla bruins" href="ncaa/ucla/index.html">
    <div class="team-badge" style="background:#2D68C4; color:#FFD100;">UCLA</div>
    <span class="team-name">UCLA Bruins</span>
    <span class="team-meta">Big Ten</span>
  </a>

  <a class="team-card" data-name="unc tar heels north carolina" href="ncaa/unc-tar-heels/index.html">
    <div class="team-badge" style="background:#7BAFD4; color:#13294B;">UNC</div>
    <span class="team-name">UNC Tar Heels</span>
    <span class="team-meta">ACC</span>
  </a>

</div>

<p class="teams-empty" id="teamsEmpty">No teams match your search.</p>

<script>
(function () {
  const search = document.getElementById('teamSearch');
  const cards  = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.team-card'));
  const empty  = document.getElementById('teamsEmpty');

  search.addEventListener('input', function () {
    const query = search.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    let anyVisible = false;

    cards.forEach(function (card) {
      const visible = query === '' || card.dataset.name.includes(query);
      card.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
      if (visible) anyVisible = true;
    });

    empty.style.display = anyVisible ? 'none' : 'block';
  });
})();
</script>
```
